---
format: html
---

# Day 1 (Mon, May 12)

::: {.callout-caution}
## Work-in-progress
This schedule is a work-in-progress and is subject to change.
:::

::: {.callout-important}
## Logistics
**Times**: All times are Eastern Daylight Time (EDT).

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=70%}
**Location**: Dewey Room, West Pattee Knowledge Commons, unless otherwise indicated.

[Map](https://map.psu.edu/?id=1134#!ct/25403,26748,26749,26750,27255?m/407561?s/Pattee)

[Directions](wayfinding.qmd)
:::
::: {.column width=30%}
![](include/img/psu_pattee_gallery2.jpg){.lightbox width="300px"}
:::
::::
:::

## Morning {- #day_1_am}

### 08:30 am • Breakfast {{< fa mug-hot >}} {{< fa bread-slice >}} {-}

### 09:00 am • Welcome and Overview {-}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=80%}
[Rick Gilmore](directors.qmd#rick-gilmore)
:::
::: {.column width=20%}
![](include/img/gilmore-rick.png){width=100px height=100px}
:::
::::

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=80%}
[Alaina Pearce](directors.qmd#alaina-pearce)
:::
::: {.column width=20%}
![](include/img/pearce-alaina.jpeg){width=100px height=100px}
:::
::::

### 09:15 am • Research Data Stewardship Program {-}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=80%}
[Briana Wham](program-committee.qmd#briana-wham)
:::
::: {.column width=20%}
![](include/img/wham-briana.jpg){width=100px height=100px}
:::
::::

### 09:45 am • Open @ Penn State {- #day_1_plenary_1}

- *Open Science and the HBCD and ABCD Cohorts*, [Koraly Perez-Edgar](presenters.qmd#koraly-pérez-edgar)
- *Advancing reproducibility through team science, data sharing, and transparency: The ENIGMA initiative*, [Frank Hillary](program-committee.qmd#frank-hillary)

### 10:00 am • Break {{< fa mug-hot >}} {-}

### 10:15 am • Keynote {- #day_1_plenary_2}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width=80%}
Melissa Kline Struhl
:::
::: {.column width=20%}
![](include/img/kline-struhl-melissa.webp){width=100px height=100px}
:::
::::

### 11:30 am • Lunch & discussion on misuse of open research data {{< fa bottle-water >}} {{< fa bread-slice >}} {-}

- Expert: [Koraly Perez-Edgar](presenters.qmd#koraly-pérez-edgar)

#### Resources

- @McIntire2026-rg
- @ESIP2024-hn

## Afternoon {- #day_1_pm}

### 01:30 pm • Workshop session 1 {- #day_1_pm_session_1}

| Topic | Presenter | Location |
|--------------|----------|-------|
| *Getting credit for sharing your data (Part I): Good enough data management practices* | [Alaina Pearce](directors.qmd#alaina-pearce) | Dewey Room |
| *Version control with git* | [Carrie Brown](program-committee.qmd#carrie-brown) | TBD |

: {tbl-colwidths="[60,20,20]"}

### 02:45 pm • Break {{< fa mug-hot >}} {-}

### 03:00 pm • Workshop session 2 {- #day_1_pm_session_2}

| Topic | Presenter | Location |
|--------------|----------|-------|
| *Quarto (Part I): A tool for open scholarship* | [Rick Gilmore](directors.qmd#directors.qmd#rick-gilmore) | W221A |
| *Getting credit (Part II): Sharing your data* |  [Alaina Pearce](directors.qmd#alaina-pearce) | Dewey Room |

### 04:15 pm • Day 1 wrap-up {-}

### 04:30 pm • End of Day 1 {-}

## References

<!-- | [*Getting started with Python in JupyterLab: A hands-on introduction*](sessions.qmd#getting-started-with-python-in-jupyterlab-a-hands-on-introduction) | [Carrie Brown](program-committee.qmd#carrie-brown) | W211A | -->
<!-- | [*Questionable research practices*](sessions.qmd#questionable-research-practices) |  [Nicole Lazar](program-committee.qmd#nicole-lazar) & [Jennifer Valcin](program-committee.qmd#jennifer-valcin) | Dewey Room |  -->
